text:
00 = No outlier 
01 = Day Outlier 
02 = Cost Outlier 
06 = Valid DRG Received from the intermediary 
07 = CMS Developed DRG 
08 = CMS Developed DRG Using Patient Status Code 
09 = Not Groupable 
10 = Composite of cost outliers 
Null/missing = Source value is missing or unknown
